name: @hanqunfeng/claude-trace
description: Record API traffic from Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex CLI

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/intercept && cp src/intercept/interceptor-loader.js src/intercept/token-extractor.js dist/intercept/ && npm run build:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.predev: tsc && mkdir -p dist/intercept && cp src/intercept/interceptor-loader.js src/intercept/token-extractor.js dist/intercept/
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:core" "npm run dev:copy" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:copy: npx nodemon --watch src/intercept/interceptor-loader.js --watch src/intercept/token-extractor.js --exec 'mkdir -p dist/intercept && cp src/intercept/interceptor-loader.js src/intercept/token-extractor.js dist/intercept/'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: Mario Zechner
